label: NorthWestern Energy
notes: Dominant IOU serving ~60% of Montana's electric load (~375,000 customers statewide). Same utility as SD entry. Bespoke customer portal — adapter needs live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.

label: Montana-Dakota Utilities
notes: Investor-owned utility serving eastern Montana (Miles City, Glendive, Sidney, Wolf Point). ~144,000 customers across MT/ND/SD/WY. Same utility as SD/ND/WY entries. Bespoke portal — adapter needs live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.
